reviews.comment:
Será por el día de lluvia? Pero el empleado tenía ladrillos en los pies, lento, le pesaba el cuerpo......se hizo tedioso

(Translated by Google)
Maybe it was because it was a rainy day? But the employee had bricks on his feet, he was slow, his body felt heavy... it became tedious.
